jobs.title: Customer Support Manager
jobs.content: <p><strong>Customer Support Manager</strong></p><p>Maven is the cohort-based-online-learning platform pioneered around the live-instructor-led-cohort data model & the cohort-based-online-learning segment.</p>

jobs.title: Senior/Staff Software Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Lead Maven's engineering function across the Courses / Lightning Lessons / Maven for Teams / Operator platform.</p>
